  "findings": [
    "Anchor point is inadequate and its 5,000-lb rating is based on guesswork rather than engineering or certification."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately.",
    "Remove the non-compliant anchor point from service.",
    "Have a qualified person design, install, or inspect a certified anchor point capable of supporting at least 5,000 lbs or maintaining a safety factor of two."
  ],
  "rationale": "Active work is being performed using an unverified anchor point. OSHA standards require fall protection anchors to be capable of supporting at least 5,000 pounds per employee attached, or be designed, installed, and used under the supervision of a qualified person as part of a complete personal fall arrest system which maintains a safety factor of at least two. Guessing at the rating is a critical safety violation that can lead to catastrophic failure.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.502(d)(15)",
    "OSHA 1910.140(c)(13)"
  ]
}
